testcase.name: @stynx/storage barrel > exports at least one symbol
DocumentsService > initiates a document with a tenant-scoped key and presigned upload
DocumentsService > normalizes initiate inputs and persists exact document metadata
DocumentsService > rejects collection size overflow
DocumentsService > rejects unknown collections, disallowed mime types, bad checksums, and missing context
DocumentsService > quarantines a document when the uploaded metadata does not match
DocumentsService > completes scan + persists scanDetail when content + checksum match
DocumentsService > uses completion headers when object metadata is absent
DocumentsService > quarantines completion when object metadata and completion headers are absent
DocumentsService > getDownloadUrl returns a signed URL via s3.presignDownload
DocumentsService > softRemove looks up the owned document + calls trx.softDelete
DocumentsService > restore calls trx.restoreFromArchive without requiring document ownership lookup
DocumentsService > reports missing, cross-tenant, and unavailable database cases
DocumentsService > hard-deletes archived documents only for the current tenant
storage errors > StorageCollectionNotFoundError carries 404 + collection context
storage errors > StorageValidationError defaults to 400 + accepts context
storage errors > StorageValidationError works with no context
storage errors > StorageTenantMismatchError carries 403 + documentId
storage errors > StorageDocumentNotFoundError carries 404 + documentId
StynxObjectStore > constructs an S3Client with the configured region
StynxObjectStore > passes endpoint + forcePathStyle through when set
StynxObjectStore > putObject sends PutObjectCommand with body + contentType
StynxObjectStore > putObject honors expiresAt when provided
StynxObjectStore > presignDownload returns a signed URL via getSignedUrl
S3Service > rejects bucket names outside the required pattern
S3Service > rate-limits tenant download presigns by minute
S3Service > resets tenant presign counters exactly at the one-minute boundary
S3Service > configures lifecycle transition and expiration rules
S3Service > configures empty lifecycle filters when optional lifecycle fields are absent
S3Service > applies object-lock retention to a specific object version
S3Service > presignUpload > returns a signed PUT URL with content-type + sha256 + KMS metadata
S3Service > presignUpload > honors caller-specified expiresInSeconds
S3Service > presignDownload (single call) > returns a signed URL with content-disposition + default expiry
S3Service > bucket() returns the resolved bucket name
S3Service > accepts explicit bucketName that matches the expected pattern
S3Service > passes endpoint and path-style client options and supports custom default expiries
S3Service > heads objects and deletes object versions or the base object fallback
S3Service > omits absent object metadata fields and deletes unversioned matches
S3Service > deletes matching delete markers when version listings are omitted
S3Service > uses the default presign rate limit when no compliance override is configured
